title: Timeline of Seoul
strengths: Convenient city chronology and pre-war population anchor.
limitations: Not a specialist Korean War casualty source.
notes: Used only for chronology and population context, not for fine casualty accounting.

title: Hangang Bridge bombing
strengths: Open and concise event-specific summary with a casualty range and a confirmed police subset.
limitations: Open source does not recover a clean civilian/military split for the whole death toll.
notes: Sufficient for a bounded demolition subepisode, not for a full DR.

title: Seoul National University Hospital massacre
limitations: Open source summary is internally inconsistent: total range, civilian count, and wounded-soldier count do not perfectly reconcile.

title: Battle of the Barricades: U.S. Marines in the Recapture of Seoul
pages_or_sections: Order-of-battle front matter; concluding casualty summary
strengths: Official monograph directly about the recapture of Seoul.
limitations: Some casualty figures are divisional/campaign-linked rather than perfectly city-administrative.
notes: Best open source for the September recapture phase, but not a clean civilian mortality source.
